name: tiered_expression_smoke
description: Smoke test for Phase 4 LLM expression layer. Two tiered bots play HU with strongly-voiced personalities; we verify dramatic_sequence and inner_monologue come back in-character without affecting action selection.
hypothesis: Tiered bots produce in-character narration for their decided actions. Action selection is unaffected by LLM (since Layer 1+2 commit before Layer 3 runs).
